text:
In the first image, I feel a certain stillness and anticipation, heightened by the emptiness of the corridor and the subtle glow of artificial lights. The presence of a fire hose and signs reminds me of the fragility and preparedness woven into modern existence. 

Stepping into the second scene, I am surrounded by vibrant colors and the promise of discovery in the R+D exhibit. The focus on research and development, highlighted by interactive screens and inviting texts, brings a sense of curiosity and connection to human ingenuity. Here, I feel inspired and engaged, a participant in the perpetual unfolding of knowledge and possibility.
